channel.title: OnDeckDJ Blog — Walk-Up Music Guides
channel.description: Articles, song lists, and game-day guides for baseball and softball walk-up music, by the OnDeckDJ team.

item.title: 100 Best Baseball Walk-Up Songs for 2026 (By Position & Vibe)
item.description: A coach's and player's guide to the songs that actually pump up a stadium — organized by hip-hop, country, rock, Latin, power, speed, closer, and youth-friendly categories.

item.title: MLB Walk-Up Songs 2026: What the Pros Are Using
item.description: Trends shaping MLB walk-up music this season, the iconic walk-ups every baseball fan knows, and how to apply pro-level thinking to your team.

item.title: Best Bluetooth Speakers for Baseball & Softball Walk-Up Music (2026 Buyer's Guide)
item.description: A no-fluff buyer's guide for outdoor speakers — what actually matters, recommendations from $80 to $1,000, and what you can skip.

item.title: How to Record Your Own Walk-Up Announcer Voice
item.description: DIY stadium-style intros — equipment, scripts, recording technique, and the 60-second OnDeckDJ shortcut if you don't want to bother with the setup.

item.title: 60 Best Walk-Up Songs for Little League & Youth Baseball
item.description: Every song is clean, kid-tested, and gets a Little League dugout fired up. Organized by vibe.

item.title: How to Play Walk-Up Songs at a Baseball Game (Coach's Guide)
item.description: Speakers, lineup setup, song lengths, volume ducking, and the quick checklist that keeps the workflow from falling apart by the third inning.
